samples.text: All cars are vehicles. A boat is a vehicle. Is a boat a car?
Every member of cars is among vehicles. A boat is a vehicle. Does it follow that a boat is a car?
All automobiles are motor vehicles. A boat is a motor vehicle. Is a boat an automobile?
Being a vehicle does not by itself make something a car. A boat is a vehicle. Is a boat a car?
All cars are vehicles. A boat is a vehicle. This topic was discussed last week. Is a boat a car?
